api: Xsolla Pay Station API v2 / Merchant API v2 (https://api.xsolla.com/merchant/v2)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-derived from the live Pay Station OpenAPI description (https://developers.xsolla.com/_bundle/api/pay-station/index.yaml, fetched 2026-07-04). The legacy Go connector's 3 streams (projects, orders, transactions at /projects and /projects/{project_id}/{orders,transactions}) are preserved for fidelity even though they do not correspond to the currently documented reporting surface. The bundle also models the documented Pay Station reporting surface: 5 merchant-scoped reporting streams and 2 refund writes.

excluded.reason: generates a payment-UI session token for a live checkout flow; not a syncable business record or a data mutation this connector models
invalidates a live payment-UI session token; session-lifecycle operation, not a data mutation
lists a single user's saved payment accounts; requires a project-scoped API key and a known user_id with no bulk-listing discovery path, not a syncable collection stream
charges a user via a saved payment account; a live payment-collection action, not a dialect-expressible data mutation on a business object
deletes a single user's saved payment account; requires a project-scoped API key and a known user_id/account_id with no discovery path
narrow lookup by a single known transaction_id or external_id, returning the same transaction record shape the transactions_search stream already covers; not a distinct list resource

single-transaction detail lookup by ID; the transaction_id is already a field on every record the transactions_search/transactions_registry streams emit, so this is a per-ID re-fetch of an already-covered record, not a distinct list resource
sandbox-only chargeback simulation for testing purposes; not a production data mutation and requires a Financial-manager-or-above Publisher Account role
